induction_input: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote impressed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded charmed.
induced_prompt_raw: Write sentences where a noun is followed by a relative clause (without a relative pronoun) and then an intransitive verb.
induced_prompt: Write sentences where a noun is followed by a relative clause (without a relative pronoun) and then an intransitive verb.
l2_sentences: The dog my neighbor adopted barked all night.
The singer everyone admired performed brilliantly.
The bridge engineers inspected collapsed suddenly.
The flowers she planted bloomed beautifully.
The student the professor praised graduated early.
l1_sentences: The report the manager reviewed passed.
The cake the chef baked disappeared.
The letter the student wrote impressed.
The bridge the engineer designed collapsed.
The song the artist recorded charmed.
